svg.title: FL-IDS diagnosis and fix plan
svg.desc: Root cause analysis and four fixes for the non-IID federated learning collapse

g.text: Each node sees only 2–3 of 8 classes → biased local gradients
model forgets unseen classes each round
Impact: low alone, needed as baseline
Stops clients drifting too far locally
Impact: HIGH for non-IID — use this
Keep 5% of each class on the server
Server evaluates all 8 classes every round
Impact: HIGH — fixes minority class F1
Guarantees all 8 classes covered by FL
Impact: VERY HIGH — core structural fix
Matches Firouzi Table 8 range with your data size

svg.text: Note: your 36K sample dataset is smaller than the paper — realistic target is 0.85+
The gap from 0.93 RF → 0.37 FL is entirely an IID/partitioning problem, not model capacity
